text.title: Code Review Basics Core Rules
text.summary: 5 light-weight rules for the basics review.

rule.statement: Every comment uses one of: praise, nitpick, suggestion, issue, question.
PRs > 400 lines are blocked from this review until split.
rule.rationale: Past 400 lines basics review provides no useful signal.

rule.statement: Reviewer posts ≤ 20 comments; surplus goes to a single 'nits' batch.
rule.rationale: Avoids author overwhelm; forces the reviewer to prioritise.

rule.statement: When uncertain about author intent, use 'question' label, not 'issue'.
rule.rationale: False-positive issues create friction; questions invite explanation.

rule.statement: Approval requires at least one human; agent draft alone never merges.
rule.rationale: Accountability cannot be delegated to agents.
